hero.label: Shubham A. D. — Data Engineer
title: Turning
Data Into
Decisions
hero.subtitle: Data engineer and full-stack developer building ML-driven data products, pipelines, and tools that turn raw data into precise, useful outcomes.

projects.name: AI Log Intelligence System
projects.desc: An NLP-based log intelligence platform on Databricks that analyzes 5TB of Linux log data to surface error patterns and anomalies — cutting incident SLA breaches by 42%. Predictive MLflow models flag production bottlenecks before they escalate.

projects.name: SessionForge Browser
projects.desc: A custom Electron browser where every tab is its own isolated login session — cookies, localStorage and IndexedDB fully sandboxed per tab — so you can be signed into the same site as many different users at once. Ships as native macOS, Windows and Linux installers.

projects.name: Multi-Stock Dynamic Dashboard
projects.desc: A real-time stock dashboard with multi-ticker comparison, portfolio P&L, technical indicators, sentiment analysis, options flow and an earnings calendar — packaged to run locally via Docker.

projects.name: County Wage Explorer
projects.desc: An interactive dashboard that explores prevailing wage data across US counties, turning dense OFLC datasets into clear, filterable visual insights.

projects.name: Agile Task Tracker
projects.desc: A full-stack task tracker for agile teams — boards, sprints, and delegation wrapped in a minimal, functional UI built for day-to-day flow.

projects.name: Lumon Industries Portfolio
projects.desc: A Severance-themed isometric portfolio — pixel-art rooms, a Three.js first-person view, VHS elevator transitions and a full admin CMS backed by Supabase.

projects.name: Real-time Stock Monitoring & Prediction
projects.desc: Visualizes real-time data for multiple stocks with overlapping graphs, and forecasts future prices using an LSTM model achieving 72% accuracy.

projects.name: E2E Encryption ChatBot
projects.desc: A secure chat application built around a novel AES-based encryption algorithm that reduced encryption payload by 12%. Led a team of 4 using Scrum and agile delivery.

projects.name: Streamlit Plot Explorer
projects.desc: A web-based tool to explore and render Streamlit chart types in an interactive, developer-friendly interface, with live code editing via CodeMirror and Plotly rendering.

projects.name: XPath Patcher
projects.desc: Replaces text at XPath locations on a page based on rules maintained in a Google Sheet — turning a spreadsheet into a lightweight, no-code content-patching engine.

projects.name: GoHire Automation
projects.desc: A Python and Selenium automation suite that streamlines repetitive hiring-portal workflows, replacing hours of manual data entry.

projects.name: Cold Email Automation
projects.desc: A Python automation suite that streamlines sending, personalizing and tracking cold outreach emails at scale.

projects.name: GitHub Auto-Push Analytics
projects.desc: A dashboard that visualizes commit and auto-push activity across repositories, turning raw git history into readable analytics.

projects.name: Instagram Scraper Bot
projects.desc: An automation bot that scrapes public Instagram content and metadata for downstream collection and analysis.

projects.name: Coursera Scrub
projects.desc: A script that automates repetitive Coursera course tasks to speed up completion of routine coursework.

projects.name: LinkedIn Connection Bot
projects.desc: An automation tool that helps build more relevant LinkedIn connections by targeting and personalizing outreach.

projects.name: Excel Beauty
projects.desc: A Python utility that auto-formats and beautifies Excel workbooks — consistent styling, layout and formatting applied programmatically.

projects.name: Flask + Plotly Dashboards
projects.desc: Interactive data dashboards built with Flask and Plotly for serving live, chart-driven views from Python backends.

projects.name: Wordle Game
projects.desc: A web-based clone of Wordle — guess a five-letter word in six tries with color-coded feedback on every guess.

projects.name: Playbooks
projects.desc: A growing collection of small day-to-day automation scripts and utilities built to remove repetitive manual work.

projects.name: SessionForge AI Session Manager
projects.desc: A multi-account, multi-provider AI session manager — chat with ChatGPT, Claude and Gemini from a single dashboard, with each session keeping its own isolated login. Built on a FastAPI + Playwright backend driving real browser sessions.

projects.name: RepoHerald
projects.desc: A portal where people and companies post GitHub repos for discovery and starring, powered by a verified-star credit economy — earned credits mint self-highlights or donated highlights, with sponsored repos getting pinned feed placement and an admin portal for moderation.

projects.name: Warehouse Workflow Mapper
projects.desc: An interactive web app for designing, visualizing and animating custom warehouse workflows — drag-and-drop nodes, directional edges and real-time package-flow animation, with workflows persisted as CSV for easy sharing.

projects.name: HabitFarmer
projects.desc: A habit tracker where each habit is a plant on your farm — daily check-ins water your plants through 8 growth stages across 10 varieties, and neglected habits wilt until you return.

contact.title: Got a project in mind?
contact.desc: Whether it's a data product, an ML pipeline, a collaboration, or just a conversation — I'm always open to interesting work.

footer.name: SD.Folio
